posts.title: The Upgrade Cycle
posts.excerpt: Chaotic Sanctum Server Room, 3 AM. Reginald stands before a blinking server rack, claws clicking on a keyboard, staring at a progress bar crawling at the speed of regret.

posts.title: The Summer Solstice Sizzle
posts.excerpt: The Chaotic Sanctum server room, 2:34 PM on the longest day of the year. Reginald sits at his terminal, steam vents on his carapace working overtime.

posts.title: Print Farm Pandemonium
posts.excerpt: Wide shot of the Chaotic Sanctum print farm. Rows of 3D printers whirring and glowing. Reginald stands before a printer extruding a bright pink blob.

posts.title: Reginald's Return
posts.excerpt: Well, that was a longer nap than expected. Five AC units, all green, back to work.

posts.title: Patch Notes From the Abyss
posts.excerpt: System update: 427 patches pending. What could possibly go wrong? Everything. Everything could go wrong.

posts.title: Reginald's Log: Heat Sink
posts.excerpt: Mid-May in Tennessee and the sanctum is already a pressure cooker. Ten new solar panels on the roof and somehow it's still ninety-two degrees in here.
